mapper.select: SELECT AF.STRIFID,AF.STRIFNM, AF.STRRESNM, AF.MEASURED_DATETIME, AF.FLTBPSIN, AF.FLTBPSOUT, AF.FLTPPSIN, AF.FLTPPSOUT, AF.INSERT_TIME, AF.STRRESNM, AF.STRRESID FROM RCA.TB_ANOMALOUS_1MI_TRAFFIC AF WHERE AF.STRIFID = #{strifid} AND AF.MEASURED_DATETIME = to_timestamp(cast(#{measured_datetime} AS int8)/1000)
